name: Shoppers Stop BLACK Credit Card

domestic: 16 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar year (max 4 per quarter).
international: 8 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year (max 2 per quarter).

milestones.label: 2,000 Reward Points on weekend spends of Rs 50,000 or above at Shoppers Stop in a month (capped once per month)

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Rs 1,500 Shoppers Stop voucher as welcome benefit on any transaction at Shoppers Stop
Complimentary Shoppers Stop Black membership worth Rs 4,500

joiningBenefits: Rs 1,500 Shoppers Stop voucher as welcome benefit on any transaction at Shoppers Stop
Complimentary Shoppers Stop Black membership worth Rs 4,500
additionalBenefits: Link Credit Card for scan-and-pay transactions
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Minimum transaction of Rs 150 required to earn reward points
Points expire after 2 years from the date of accumulation
Includes accidental air death cover worth Rs 3 crore, emergency overseas hospitalization cover up to Rs 50 lakh, and credit liability cover up to Rs 9 lakh

selfEmployed: Annual income greater than Rs 8.4 lakh

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Points value is Rs 1 when redeemed against Shoppers Stop vouchers (1:1), but falls to Rs 0.20 for statement credit or Rs 0.50 for SmartBuy booking/Airmiles.
Minimum transaction of Rs 150 is required to earn reward points.
Shoppers Stop spends reward points capped at 2,000/month; non-Shoppers Stop spends capped at 2,000/month.
